news.headline: PM Shehbaz 'graciously' approves spectators for PSL 11 final on franchise owners’ request: Naqvi
news.summary:
<p>Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has decided to allow spectators into the stadium for the final of the 11th edition of the Pakistan Super League (PSL), Interior Minister and PCB Chairman Mohsin Naqvi said on Saturday.</p>

news.headline: 7,000-year history of China stilted houses celebrates human ingenuity, offers insights
news.summary:
With sturdy wooden columns supporting a wide walkway that leads into a living space, stilted houses – known as ganlan in Chinese – represent a quintessential element of East Asian architectural heritage, boasting a remarkable history that spans 7,000 years.

news.headline: Lakers down Rockets in overtime for 3-0 series lead, Celtics beat Sixers
news.summary: Elsewhere in the NBA playoffs, Spurs beat Trail Blazers 120-108 without Victor Wembanyama to take a 2-1 series lead.
